cases.prompt: Create a draft pull request for the current branch with a What / Why / How description.
cases.expected_behavior: Creates a draft PR using the structured template.

cases.prompt: Open a draft PR and derive the title from the branch if I do not provide one.
cases.expected_behavior: Follows the draft PR workflow and chooses an appropriate title.

cases.prompt: Can you review this branch before I open a PR?
cases.expected_behavior: This is a review request, not PR creation.

cases.prompt: Make a draft PR even though I only gave you a short title and no body.
cases.expected_behavior: Creates the PR and fills in the description from branch and diff context.
